message:
✨ Add Netlify Functions for missions API proxy (#1583)

The Mission Browser on console.kubestellar.io was showing "No installer
missions found" because the static Netlify deployment has no Go backend
to proxy /api/missions/file and /api/missions/browse requests to the
kubestellar/console-kb GitHub repo.

Add two Netlify Functions that proxy these endpoints:
- missions-file: fetches raw file content from raw.githubusercontent.com
- missions-browse: lists directory contents via GitHub Contents API

Both functions cache responses in Netlify Blobs (1h TTL) with CDN edge
caching (10min) to avoid hitting GitHub API on every visitor load. Stale
cache is served as fallback when GitHub is unavailable or rate-limited.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,17 @@
   to = "/.netlify/functions/presence"
   status = 200
 
+# Missions API — proxy to Netlify Function (console-kb knowledge base)
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/api/missions/file"
+  to = "/.netlify/functions/missions-file"
+  status = 200
+
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/api/missions/browse"
+  to = "/.netlify/functions/missions-browse"
+  status = 200
+
 # GA4 event collection — custom lightweight tracker sends directly to /api/m
 # (Netlify Function via Config.path, no gtag.js loaded)
